If I lost you I‚Äôd still have me I can‚Äôt lose
When you say that you‚Äôre obsessed w me, me too 
 
I did my hair like waves on the beach
This dress so tight you can‚Äôt even speak
My heels so high you might get a nose bleed
Music‚Äôs so loud but I hear your heartbeat 

#Obsessed

snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia‚Äã‚Äã

Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook‚Äã‚Äã
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial‚Äã‚Äã
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter‚Äã‚Äã
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube‚Äã‚Äã

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äã #FutureNostalgia‚Äã #Grammys

snippet.title: ¬°LAS HORMIGAS PINTARON A UNA LARVA! Primer logro de mis HORMIGAS de JARDIN
snippet.description:
¬°Hoy continuamos los experimentos con hormigas! Vamos a alimentar a mis hormigas con larvas y capullos, por supuesto utilizando el mismo sirop de colores y de azucar que utilizamos en el video pasado. Si nunca habias visto hormigas que cambian de color, pues estas a punto de ver algo increible. Vamos a ver un poco como viven las hormigas y su reaccion a este sirop de colores y a las larvas. Veremos como se alimentan las hormigas y les mostraremos los resultados inesperados en camara lenta. Ya no hay mas nada que contarles, solo vamos a comenzar de una vez con los experimentos divertidos y a ver a nuestras hormigas que cambian de color y ver que ocurre con las larvas. No te despegues del canal de los mejores experimentos, si te preguntas que hacer cuando estas aburrido, ya tienes la respuesta! Asi que vamos a experimentar

¬°Suscribir! - https://www.facebook.com/ellocotimon/

‚ñ∫ Para propuestas comerciales: timon@mediacube.in 

Este canal es la VERSI√ìN OFICIAL del canal TimOn ChaveS para la audiencia hispanohablante.

snippet.title: "To Begin Again" - Ingrid Michaelson x ZAYN (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
To Begin Again Merch Collection is here! https://shop.ingridmichaelson.com/

Lyric Video by Kelly Ford
Cover Illustration by Milkglass 

‚ÄúTo Begin Again‚Äù Ingrid Michaelson x ZAYN
Written by Ingrid Michaelson, Sarah Aarons and ZAYN
Produced by Sam de Jong
Mixed by Rob Kinelski
Mastered by Emily Lazar

Lyrics:
When the world was ending
I‚Äôd hold you in my arms
And we talked about the places we‚Äôd never been
When the world was ending
We‚Äôd hold on to the past
Because it‚Äôs all we thought that we would ever see
But then the sun came right back
And the birds sang as if nothing had happened

And, it‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I don‚Äôt know how
I don‚Äôt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again

When the world was ending
We looked up at the sky
And we talked about the last song that we‚Äôd play
So far from comprehending
They‚Äôd lift us to the stars
Never seen each other from so far away
But then the sun came right back
And the kids played as if nothing had happened

And, it‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I don‚Äôt know how
I don‚Äôt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again

And cry because I‚Äôm happy
And hold my friends like long lost lovers
Be kind to me and love each other
The world keeps spinning on

It‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get another day
 
I don‚Äôt know how
I don‚Äôt know when
But I do know that we can
Try to begin again, to begin again
To begin to live and love and breathe again

snippet.title: Degree Confluence Project, el plan colectivo m√°s incre√≠ble
snippet.description:
Los paralelos y meridianos son l√≠neas imaginarias con las que se puede dividir toda la superficie de la Tierra. ¬øAlguna vez te preguntaste qu√© hay en los puntos en los que se forman intersecciones entre ambos? 

Un grupo de personas s√≠ lo hizo y as√≠ naci√≥ el Degree Confluence Project. Lo bueno es que es probable que te encuentres relativamente cerca de una, ya que no es posible estar a m√°s de 79 kil√≥metros de una confluencia. 

Hasta el momento se alcanz√≥ el 40% del objetivo, por lo que a√∫n quedan muchas por visitar y registrar.

en.title: Degree Confluence Project, the most incredible collective plan
en.description:
Parallels and meridians are imaginary lines with which the entire surface of the Earth can be divided. Have you ever wondered what is at the points where they intersect between the two?

A group of people did, and the Degree Confluence Project was born. It is a collective project that set out to visit the confluences that exist on the planet. Would you like to know any? The good news is that you are likely to be relatively close to one, since it is not possible to be more than 79 kilometers from a confluence.

So far 40% of the goal has been reached, so there are still many to visit and register.

For those who want to know more about the project: confluence.org

Thanks to Fronteras Blog, where we learned about this story: bordersblog.com

üåé Un Mundo Inmenso
Singularities of our planet

‚úÖ Subscribe! https://bit.ly/2POYtLu

üåü Become a member! https://bit.ly/2YrLbf8

üî• Follow us: 
https://instagram.com/UnMundoInmenso
https://twitter.com/UnMundoInmenso
https://facebook.com/MundoInmenso

Um grupo de pessoas o fez, e o Degree Confluence Project nasceu. √â um projeto coletivo que se prop√µe a visitar as conflu√™ncias que existem no planeta. Voc√™ gostaria de saber algum? snippet.title: ¬°PINTE A MIS HORMIGAS DE VARIOS COLORES!
snippet.description:
¬°Chicos hice un experimento con hormigas y a que no adivinan...tengo hormigas que cambian de color! Se trata de las hormigas fellah o camponotus fellah...he preparado sirop de colores: rosado y azul. Los coloqu√© en un vidrio y espera a que las hormigas fellah llegaran y bebieran el sirop de colores. Resultados inesperados completamente: las hormigas cambian de color! Al beber el sirop de colores sus barrigas cambian de color, es una de las reacciones quimicas mas interesantes que he visto en mi vida, y por su puesto se los mostrar√© en camara lenta para que la diversion y el entretenimiento no tengan limite. Adoro los experimentos caseros como este llenos de curiosidades, para mas videos divertidos y experimentos divertidos...date un paseo por mi canal! No te despegues del canal de los mejores experimentos, si te preguntas que hacer cuando estas aburrido, ya tienes la respuesta! Asi que vamos a experimentar

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! - Power League, Trophy Road Brawler, and Seasonal Rewards!
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ‚Äî or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/
